{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Description

A flaw was identified in the OpenSearch Security plugin's document-level security (DLS) implementation. DLS restrictions were not correctly applied to search queries that use has_parent or has_child join relations. This could allow an authenticated user to access document contents that should have been restricted by DLS rules.

### Impact

An authenticated user with access to an index containing parent/child join relations could bypass DLS restrictions on documents linked by those relations, potentially accessing restricted document contents. This only affects clusters that use both DLS and the `join` field type on the same index.

### Patches

 This issue is fixed in OpenSearch `2.19.4` and `3.2.0`.

### Workarounds

Avoid using the `join` field type on indices that are subject to DLS rules.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T00:08:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-07T00:08:34Z", "references": ["https://github.com/opensearch-project/security/security/advisories/GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/opensearch-project/security/security-advisories/GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/opensearch-project/security", "summary": "OpenSearch Security plugin: DLS not applied on documents linked by has_child or has_parent relation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-07T00:08:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x83w-23jp-g6pw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.19.4.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.opensearch.plugin:opensearch-security"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0, <= 2.19.3"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.2.0.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.opensearch.plugin:opensearch-security"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0, <= 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenSearch Security plugin: DLS not applied on documents linked by has_child or has_parent relation
